title: ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES - 211info
text: HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY ANIMAL SHELTER AND ADOPTION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A no-kill shelter where community members can adopt animals. All dogs and cats have been spayed and neutered, are up-to-date on vaccines and have been treated for fleas and dewormed. All cats and kittens have been treated for ear mites and tested for Feline Leukemia and Feline AIDS. 10601 SE Loop Road Dayton, OR 97114 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Summer Hours (March-October): Thursday-Saturday 10am-5pm Winter Hours (October-March): Thursday-Saturday 10am-4pm Email (503) 472-0341 1 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-0341 ext 1 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln, Marion, Polk, Tillamook, and Yamhill Counties Services: Animal Adoption Animal Shelters If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HOMEWARD BOUND PETS HUMANE SOCIETY
